name: agricultural_policy_heat_dome_stresses_cedar_ind_col
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Agricultural Policy, the situation tagged internally around agricultural policy heat dome stresses cedar ind col has converged with local pressure in the Lumen City corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as individual against collective; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Elliot Santos
agents.identity: I am Elliot Santos, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Agricultural Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Darius Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Darius Kowalski, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Agricultural Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if individual advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for collective.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Elliot Santos must choose under individual versus collective. What does Elliot Santos do?
